action: He wakes before sunrise in his tent, lies still listening to the rhythm of waves and rustling palms.
thought: It's quieter here than anywhere else. That might be the point.

action: He moves across the beach in the pre-dawn light, surveying the island with a builder's eye, already planning where things could go.
thought: This place has potential. And so do I.

action: She walks barefoot to the water's edge and stands perfectly still, watching the first light touch the horizon.
thought: Everything here is honest. No pretense. Just being.

description: Ryan encounters Jade at the water's edge as the sun rises, and they share their first real conversation of the island.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Hey—oh, sorry. Didn't want to startle you.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You didn't. I saw you coming.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I'm Ryan. Just exploring. Trying to get the lay of things.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: There's not much to sense. Just island.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Fair enough. I'm building a shelter actually. Something solid.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Where?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Central. Wanted to be in the middle, in case. You live here?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: The hammock's mine.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: That's very... free.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I don't like being tied down.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I just meant the hammock seemed—never mind. I get it.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You're easy to read.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Is that bad?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Haven't decided yet.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: But you've decided to stay. That means something, right?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: This place is different. It's honest.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: And we're not?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Are you?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I'm trying to be. I want to build something real here.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: A house.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Maybe more than that.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: You don't know me yet.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I know. That's what's interesting.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Most people get bored when they realize I'm not mysterious.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I'm not most people.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: No. You're not.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Is that good?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I don't know. Ask me later.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I will. I promise.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: [silence as the sun breaks the horizon]

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: My name is Jade.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I know. You told me.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I'm reminding you. In case you forget what this felt like.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I won't forget.

action: He stands at the edge of his tent, looking out toward the water where the sun is already warm.
He's working to reinforce the frame of his shelter, though his mind keeps drifting elsewhere.
thought: Can't stop thinking about her voice.

action: She walks along the shoreline, her feet finding patterns in the sand that lead nowhere particular.
thought: He listened like I was the only person alive.

description: Ryan is working on his shelter when Jade approaches from the path, and they sit together overlooking the water.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: You're awake early. Wondered if I'd see you.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Couldn't sleep. Too much sky, too many stars.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I know exactly what you mean. First night's always strange.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Is it strange for you too? You seem... settled.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Settled's a good word for what I'm trying. Not always working.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: What happens when it doesn't work?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I usually panic a little, then fix it. Build something better.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: So you're a fixer. That makes sense with the house.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I'm trying to fix everything. Maybe that's my whole problem.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: What if some things aren't meant to be fixed?

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Like what? Give me an example.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Like... meeting someone you weren't planning to meet.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: You think I'm trying to fix what's happening with us?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: I think you're deciding it's something good before you know it.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Isn't that what hope is? Deciding something's good first?

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Hope's dangerous. It breaks easy.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: So does everything else. Might as well risk it, then.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: That's one way to live. Bold and reckless.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: You're living it too, though. On an island with two strangers.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: That's different. That's just happening. I didn't choose it.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: But you could leave. You're choosing to stay.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Stay and see what happens. Very different than deciding it's good.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Okay. I hear the difference. Fair enough.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: But I'm glad I'm talking to you instead of... not.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: That's something. That's actually something.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Don't make it bigger than it is though.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: I'll try. No promises though.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: At least you're honest about it. Marcus doesn't seem honest.

dialogue.speaker: ryan
dialogue.line: Marcus is... he's got his reasons for being closed off.

dialogue.speaker: jade
dialogue.line: Do you know his reasons? Does he trust you with them?
